name: ADRENAL CYST

demographics.Histo: lined by cells resembling normal endothelium

dominant_finding: well-circumscribed nonenhancing hypoattenuating lesion of < 20 HU (near-water density);
discriminating_features: well-circumscribed encapsulated uni- / multilocular lesion with internal septa
thin wall of < 3 mm in thickness (unless pseudocyst)
lack of central enhancement ± wall and septal enhancement
well-circumscribed nonenhancing hypoattenuating lesion of < 20 HU (near-water density);

general: well-circumscribed encapsulated uni- / multilocular lesion with internal septa
thin wall of < 3 mm in thickness (unless pseudocyst)
lack of central enhancement ± wall and septal enhancement
CT: well-circumscribed nonenhancing hypoattenuating lesion of < 20 HU (near-water density);
MR: uniformly hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI
± septations / soft-tissue component ← hemorrhage / hyalinized thrombus
multilocular thin-walled cyst containing serous / serosanguinous / clear fluid
internal scattered echogenicity ← debris / fluid-fluid levels from recent hemorrhage
variable internal complexity ← daughter vesicles, freed scolices, brood capsules

clinical.Cx: hypertension; hemorrhage; infection; rupture with retroperitoneal hemorrhage
clinical.Prognosis: interval increase in cyst size in 60%
